warnings: One of 3 distinct views on sheet A-15; siblings are _view1_fixture_symbol_schedule.json and _view3_mount_height_schedule.json.

This 1:20 detail shows a standard bathroom concrete counter (มาตรฐานเคาน์เตอร์ ค.ส.ล) construction section — granite-clad concrete counter top over a light steel-mesh-reinforced slab, with a mirror mounted on plywood backing above, standing on a plastered wall base; floor finish note 'พื้นภายในห้องน้ำ' at the bottom. Total height 2.00m (1.00+0.20+0.20+0.60), width 0.60m.
Content and dimensions are essentially identical to house #3's equivalent counter detail (same layer stack-up, same 0.60m width) — cross-confirms the reading.
This generic counter detail is the shared construction standard referenced by LAV.1 in all 3 of this house's bathrooms (WC.1/WC.2/WC.3) — see the respective WC plan/section sheets.
